reviews.review_title: The only review you should listen to
reviews.review_description: This game is the best game ever, and the only reason it is the best game ever is because of how cute the icon is. I’m not sure why I feel this way but something about the icon just makes me wanna kiss it, it’s just so cute!!!

As lead developer of the hit video game “Dread”, I was thinking… why don’t I use ChatGPT for script and extra? So I began my amazing journey of game making, and it had brought me hear! I am very amazig and shocked by all of the support especially the women who goes by the name of Goofy Guy, thank you all so very Egas Much!

reviews.review_title: how tf do I play multiplayer
reviews.review_description: the graphics are good it's just it doesn't tell you how to go in multiplayer and every game gorilla tag fan games load you in a public lobby but not this one like how tf do I play it with people if I the game can't even tell me how

I have loved all the static games (their old projects) and this game is 10000X Better! With The Horror Levels So Far Are Very Well Made, I Would Recommend This Game To Everyone I Know If They Had A VR lol
It’s like animal company and big scary had a baby called Dread
this game is so awesome and scary at the same time the only thing i don’t like is how dark it is but other than that the games amazing
It’s really nice, good graphics, and good cosmetics!
